Tests the conversion of `null` to a boolean value using the `Boolean` function.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Boolean` function in JavaScript. It verifies that when `null` is passed to the `Boolean` function, the result is `false`. This test is useful for confirming the expected conversion of `null` to a boolean value, which is a common operation in JavaScript. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on this single type conversion check.
